plan.goal: Implement the projections architecture from docs/PRISM_PROJECTIONS.md by making authority planes explicit, introducing first-class projection contracts and freshness semantics, separating published/serving/ad-hoc projections cleanly from authored truth, and exposing stable projection-oriented read surfaces across PRISM docs, MCP, CLI, and query/runtime layers.
plan.title: Implement the projections architecture from docs/PRISM_PROJECTIONS.md by making authority planes explicit, introducing first-class projection contracts and freshness semantics, separating published/serving/ad-hoc projections cleanly from authored truth, and exposing stable projection-oriented read surfaces across PRISM docs, MCP, CLI, and query/runtime layers.
